title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a creator in Pakistan, you might be struggling to sell courses online due to the restrictions imposed by popular platforms like Stripe. You're not alone – many countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and Pakistan, face similar hurdles when it comes to using platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. But what if you could sell your digital products without these restrictions getting in the way? In this post, we'll explore the options available to you and help you find a permanent solution to this problem.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's start by looking at what each option actually offers. Stripe, for instance, provides a robust payment processing system but is not available in many countries, including Pakistan. PayPal, on the other hand, has a more limited set of features and is not available in over 100 countries. Gumroad and Payhip are more limited still, with Gumroad having a higher transaction fee and Payhip not being available in many countries. Meanwhile, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a complete store infrastructure, including automated delivery, wallet integration, and admin dashboard, without the need for a payment processor account.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, each option has its own approach. Stripe, for instance, is not available in many countries, while PayPal has a more limited set of features in these countries. Gumroad and Payhip are not available in many countries at all. In contrast, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is designed to be accessible from anywhere in the world, without the need for KYC or other restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each option has its own set of trade-offs. Stripe, for instance, has fast payment processing but charges a higher transaction fee. PayPal has slower payment processing but lower fees. Gumroad and Payhip have even slower payment processing and higher fees. Meanwhile, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers fast payment processing and lower fees, without the need for a payment processor account.
Crypto-native infrastructure offers a permanent solution to restricted countries and payment processor accounts.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, each option has its own set of features. Stripe, for instance, offers automated payment processing but requires a payment processor account. PayPal has automated payment processing but with limitations. Gumroad and Payhip do not have automated payment processing. In contrast, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers automated delivery, wallet integration, and admin dashboard, without the need for a payment processor account.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So which option should you choose based on your situation? If you're a creator in Pakistan or another restricted country, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle might be the best option for you. With its complete store infrastructure, automated delivery, wallet integration, and admin dashboard, it offers a permanent solution to the problem of restricted countries and payment processor accounts.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Automated delivery and wallet integration simplify the payment process for creators.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're facing similar restrictions with other platforms, such as Gumroad or Payhip, or if you're looking for a more reliable alternative to PayPal, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle might be the solution you're looking for. You can find more information about the Full Stack Bundle and its features on our website – and even check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
A complete store infrastructure, including admin dashboard, provides a reliable and accessible option for creators.
